description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build Wheels that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. Use a matrix job strategy to build wheels on both ubuntu-latest and windows-latest environments. For each environment, check out the repository, set up Python 3.x with pip caching, and then prepare the build environment using cmake. Install cibuildwheel and use it to build wheels for various architectures, skipping certain platforms.
